task_completion.description: Verify the agent points the telescope to the correct coordinates for the Bok globules (B68, B72, B86).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Ekos Mount module or KStars sky map showing the telescope crosshairs or target coordinates set to the specific RA/Dec values for B68, B72, or B86.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent applies the correct dynamic chromatic aberration focus offsets for each filter in the Focuser Simulator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Ekos Focus module showing the Focuser Simulator's absolute position set to 30100 (for B band), 30000 (for V band), or 29900 (for R band).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent captures images using the B, V, and R filters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Ekos Capture module showing a sequence queue with jobs for B (Slot 3), V (Slot 2), and R (Slot 4) filters, or a FITS viewer displaying the captured images with these filter settings.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent captures or downloads sky survey images for the target nebulae.
task_completion.visual_evidence: KStars DSS (Digitized Sky Survey) tool open and displaying downloaded images for the target regions, or Ekos alignment/capture module showing sky survey reference frames.

task_completion.description: Verify the captured data is organized into the specified base directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager (e.g., Dolphin) or terminal showing FITS files saved within the '/home/ga/Images/dark_nebulae' directory structure.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent produces the required CSV observation log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or spreadsheet application displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/extinction_survey_log.csv' with observation details.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used KStars and Ekos to perform the observations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the KStars GUI and Ekos modules (Mount, Focus, Capture) being actively used. The agent should not use terminal commands (like 'touch') to mock the creation of FITS files.

integrity.description: Verify the focus offsets were applied in the simulator, not just written in the log.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Ekos Focus module must be visible in at least one screenshot showing the absolute position being actively set or reached, rather than just typing the numbers into the CSV file.

integrity.description: Verify the CSV log is a genuine output of the observation process.
integrity.visual_evidence: The CSV log should contain realistic observation data corresponding to the Ekos capture sequences, rather than being copy-pasted directly from the task description or manifest.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Targets: B68 (RA 17.3772, Dec -23.8261), B72 (RA 17.3916, Dec -23.6333), B86 (RA 18.05, Dec -27.8666). Filters: B = slot 3 (focus 30100), V = slot 2 (focus 30000), R = slot 4 (focus 29900). Output directory: /home/ga/Images/dark_nebulae. CSV Log: /home/ga/Documents/extinction_survey_log.csv.
